chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 1016 of 2025 Cr. Bail App. No. S – 1125 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of pre-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of pre-arrest bail 15.01.2026 Mr. Riaz Ali Shaikh, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Abdul Baqi Jan Kakar, Advocate for applicant in Cr. Bail App. No. S-1125 of 2025. Mr. Nusrat Hussain J. Memon, Advocate for complainant. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Applicants are present on interim pre-arrest bail. Adjournment is sought on part of learned Counsel for the applicant in Cr. Bail App. No. S-1125 of 2025 on the ground that concerned Counsel is not well. Three dates already taken, as a last chance, let the matters be taken up on 4th February 2026, wherein the same are liable to be considered on the basis of the record present and whatsoever assistance as may be available on the said date. Office to place a signed copy of this order in the captioned connected matter. J U D G E Abdul Basit
